_doc: Synthetic unit oracle for R9 lean-tier issue exclusion (harness §45). Seeds context FACTS (some non-obvious → lean, some obvious → deep) and ISS- DEFECTS (always deep, even one carrying a lean hint and one sharing a match-key with a lean fact). Asserts: 0 issues in lean, every issue in deep, the shared-key fact stays lean while its sibling defect is deep-only.

findings.text: ownership check is order-of-declaration, not nearest-inheritance
boot sequence is one ordered call-chain
IF-1: admin path enforces ownership; API path does NOT (shares the BR-auth:001 site)
IF-2: model field nickname has no live column (lean-hinted, MUST stay deep)
